sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59494" key="koustoumhna=ton" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κουστουμην-ᾶτον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n59494.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">drink made from Crustumerian pears</tr_>, ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
